title: Porcelain Tapas Dishes,Snack Bowls for Tapa,Tapas Bowl Set,Ceramic Dipping Bowls,6pcs Ø 10 cm Small Spice Bowl,Dishes Sauce Dishe for Sushi,Sauce,Snack and Soy
features: Capacity 70 ml. Diameter: 9.8 cm, height: 2.5 cm.The small dipping bowl are perfect for food prepping, sushi sauce,tomato sauce, salad soy sauce, BBQ,snacks and other party.

Made from high quality porcelain that is non-toxic and lead-free. The elegant cutlery set is heat resistant, so it won't easily break at high temperatures. They can be used in MICROWAVE, OVEN, DISHWASHER, REFRIGERATOR.
The beautiful bohemian patterns with exquisite underglaze processing features make each bowl unique. Make ordinary dishes look carefully prepared.

Condiment bowls are perfect for custom dips, such as BBQ and salad dressings, ketchup for french fries, butter for draining shrimp or chutney and olive oil, etc. Also great for serving small dishes, desserts, appetizers, prep recipes, condiments, and so on.
These spice bowls set the perfect mood for every meal. You can share delicacies and joy with your families and friends. They are a nice gift for Thanksgiving, Christmas, housewarming, birthday, etc.
description: Ceramic is a non-toxic material calcined at high temperature, which is non-polluting to the environment and a recyclable material. Using ceramic tableware can reduce the use of plastic tableware, eliminate environmental pollution and waste energy. Ceramic tableware is easier to clean than metal tableware and will not rust. Package Information: 6 X Small Dip Bowls
